docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME (*****PETITION IS STRICKEN PER ORDER FILED ON 4/4/08*****) FILED BY PETITIONER PETERS, CHRISTOPHER LEE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER PETERS, CHRISTOPHER LEE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER FILED BY PETITIONER PETERS, CHRISTOPHER LEE HEARING SET FOR MAY-01-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER PETERS, CHRISTOPHER LEE HEARING SET FOR MAR-19-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER PETERS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. CHRISTOPHER LEE PETERS HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO PETITIONER PETERS, CHRISTOPHER LEE
FEES NOT PAID. PETITION OF CHRISTOPHER LEE PETERS FILED ON 2/29/08 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2008 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER. NO APPEARANCE - OFF CALENDAR.
